Please fill in all sections using CAPITAL LETTERS.

3. Current Address

Language Course
Undergraduate Degree Course

High School

10. Declaration

I declare that the above information is true and accurate and agree that any false statement can lead to the termination of my admission or enrollment at the university.

Agreement for Collection and Use of Personal Information

1. Consent to Collection and Use of Personal Information

Personal information to be collected: Name, Nationality, Date of Birth, Gender, Address, Email, Contact Numbers, Family Relationship Certificates, Academic Certificates and Transcripts, Passport Number, Foreigner Registration Information.

Purpose: Admission and Management of International Students. Period of retention: 5 Years.

2. Consent to Collection and Use of Personal Identification Information

Items: Passport Number, Foreigner Registration Number. Purpose: Admission and Management of International Students. Retention: 5 Years.

3. Consent to provide personal information to third parties

Parties: The Ministry of Justice, The Immigration Office, Insurance Companies/Organizations. Purpose: Admission and Management of International Students.

Letter of Consent (학력조회동의서)

This is to confirm that I have attended and completed the stated school. By applying I understand and agree this university may request my academic records from previous schools.

Phone: +82 33.639.0131 · Fax: +82.33.639.0303 · Email: info@kduniv.ac.kr
